popup.title: Airdrop
popup.description: Airdrops are usually found in somewhat hidden locations and usually contain really valuable loot. You can easily tell if they've been looted from a distance.

popup.title: Bus Terminal
popup.description: Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of map).

popup.title: Path to Onotos Mountains
popup.description: Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of map).

popup.title: Cable Car Station Extract
popup.description: Use the Cable Car Switch to call a cable car. Pay 7,500 Koen to activate the Extraction Point. Stand in either cable car to start extraction.

popup.title: Parking Lot
popup.description: Active 25min after the raid starts. Only available sometimes.

popup.title: Dam Sluice Gate
popup.description: Open the sluice from the 407 control panellocated on the second floor of the dam to start the 90s countdown for the first-floor Extraction Point.

popup.title: Access Bridge
popup.description: Active 25 min after the raid starts.

popup.title: Lifeboat
popup.description: Use the lifeboat key to turn on the engine. 50s to activation.

popup.title: Armored Vehicle
popup.description: Deliver 2 dog tags and get 60s to extract using the Armored Vehicle Extraction Point.

popup.title: Eastern Bridge
popup.description: Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of the map).

popup.title: Village End
popup.description: Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of the map).

popup.title: Communication Station Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the first floor on top of a desk (20 second timer).

popup.title: First Floor Cable Car Station Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the first floor near the center of the room (20 second timer).

popup.title: Sewage Plant Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the second floor of the main building in the Sewage Plant area (20-second timer).

popup.title: Sawmill Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the in a warehouse behind a wood pile (20 second timer).

popup.title: Access Bridge Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the bridge [only appears sometimes] (20 second timer).

popup.title: Third Floor Building C Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the third floor right inside a corner office (20 second timer).

popup.title: Third Floor Camp Services Safe
popup.description: Electronic Safe located on the third floor on top of a desk (20 second timer).

popup.title: Building C Storage Room Key
popup.description: Key to the storage room on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. It is currently used as a temporary armory and may contain crucial military supplies.

popup.title: Building C Lounge 1 Key
popup.description: Key to Building C Lounge 1 on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. It is currently being used as a temporary server room and holds a lot of valuable electronic equipment.

popup.title: Building C Lounge Private Room Key
popup.description: Key to the private lounge in VIP lounge 2 on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. The room may hold a lot of valuable personal items.

popup.title: Building D Projection Room Key
popup.description: Key to the cinema on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. There may be interesting items there.

popup.title: D202 Key
popup.description: Key to room 202 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. It is currently being used as an armory. There may be rare military supplies there.

popup.title: D208 Key
popup.description: Key to room 208 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. The room is currently being used as an office and mey hold electronics equipment.

popup.title: A207 Key
popup.description: A key for hotel room 207 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building A, currently being used as an armory.

popup.title: Building B Reception Room Key
popup.description: Key to the reception room on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. The room holds a lot of valuable items.

popup.title: B203 Key
popup.description: A key to room 203 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. The room is currently being used as an office. There might be some office items inside.

popup.title: Building B Manager's Office Key
popup.description: Key to the hotel manager's room in the Office on the first floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. There might be some valuable items inside.

popup.title: C115 Key
popup.description: Key to room 115 on the first floor of Northridge hotel Building C. It is currently being used as a power storage room.

popup.title: N. Village House Key
popup.description: Key to a house in Northridge N. Village

popup.title: Sewage Plant Workshop Key
popup.description: Key to the Workshop on the first floor of Sewage Plant Work Area 1 in Northridge. There are some workbenches inside.

popup.title: Cafeteria Cashier's Office Key
popup.description: Key to the Cashier's Office in the Observation Deck Cafeteria. Several valuables are inside.

popup.title: Cafeteria Storage Room Key
popup.description: This key opens the Cafeteria Storage in the Camp Service Center.

popup.title: Service Area Manager's Office Key
popup.description: This is the key to the Manager's Office on the second floor of the Northridge Service Area. There are valuables inside.

popup.title: Lifeboat Key
popup.description: Key to the Lifeboat on Northridge Lake

popup.title: Computer
popup.description: This category has Military and normal computers as one. Loot usually consists of cheaper wires and related items, but can be very profitable if you manage to find a GPU or similar item.
